query:
CREATE TABLE `invitations` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`token` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`createdBy` int NOT NULL,
	`usedBy` int,
	`usedAt` timestamp,
	`expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `invitations_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `invitations_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`)
);

CREATE TABLE `movements` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`productId` int NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('sale','restock','adjustment') NOT NULL,
	`quantity` int NOT NULL,
	`unitPrice` decimal(12,2),
	`shippingCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`currency` enum('USD','CUP') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
	`notes` text,
	`createdBy` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `movements_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `price_history` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`productId` int NOT NULL,
	`priceType` enum('cost','sale') NOT NULL,
	`oldPrice` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL,
	`newPrice` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL,
	`changedBy` int,
	`changedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`notes` text,
	CONSTRAINT `price_history_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `products` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(100),
	`costPrice` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	`salePrice` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	`stock` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`lowStockThreshold` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 5,
	`supplier` varchar(255),
	`notes` text,
	`currency` enum('USD','CUP') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
	`isActive` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`createdBy` int,
	CONSTRAINT `products_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `settings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`key` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`value` text NOT NULL,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`updatedBy` int,
	CONSTRAINT `settings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `settings_key_unique` UNIQUE(`key`)
);

INSERT INTO `settings` (`key`, `value`) VALUES ('exchangeRate', '240') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = `value`;
INSERT INTO `settings` (`key`, `value`) VALUES ('defaultCurrency', 'USD') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = `value`;
INSERT INTO `settings` (`key`, `value`) VALUES ('lowStockDefault', '5') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = `value`;
